data.title: GLG Opens Office in San Francisco
data.description: GLG, a renowned platform for trusted human expertise, has recently inaugurated an office in San Francisco's Financial District as part of its strategic move to enhance engagement with clients in the technology, consulting, and finance sectors. This expansion marks a notable step for GLG, aimed at fostering closer connections with its clientele. The new office location in the bustling Financial District is strategically positioned to cater to the company's growing customer base in the region. With this move, GLG is poised to further solidify its presence in the market and facilitate seamless access to its services for a wide range of industries. The decision to establish a hub in such a pivotal area underscores GLG's commitment to providing unparalleled expertise and solutions to its clients.

data.title: Stratus Medical Recognized on Fortune's America's Most Innovative Companies List for 2026
data.description: A Texas-based company, Stratus® Medical, specializing in advancing radiofrequency ablation (RFA) treatment for chronic pain, has recently been honored by Fortune as one of America's Most Innovative Companies for the year 2026. This prestigious recognition is a testament to Stratus® Medical's commitment to transforming chronic pain management through innovative RFA techniques. This accolade, powered by Fortune, highlights the company's dedication to revolutionizing the healthcare industry.

data.title: Industrial Construction Leader Nox Group Expands to Reno to Support 100-Megawatt Data Center
data.description: Nox Group, a hyper-scale industrial builder, is expanding its operations to Reno with a significant data center project. This move is set to boost investment in the area's workforce, marking the company's entry into a highly coveted market for mission-critical infrastructure. With four subsidiary companies under its umbrella, including electrical contractor Corbins, Nox Group is viewed as one of the rapidly growing construction firms in the U.S. Reno's economy is expected to benefit from this development.

data.title: Cordless Freedom Meets Corded Power: Wahl® Launches the Cordless LI+ Deluxe Chrome Pro® Haircutting Kit
data.description: Wahl®, the trusted brand by professionals since 1919, has introduced a modern upgrade to its iconic grooming tool. The new model is equipped with Lithium-ion power, ensuring long runtime and powerful performance. Based in STERLING, Ill., the company aims to provide quality haircutting experience for home users with this latest launch in March 25, 2026.

data.title: Professional Pitcher Anthony Eyanson Partners with National Eating Disorders Association to Turn Strikeouts Into Donations
data.description: A partnership has been formed between professional pitcher Anthony Eyanson and the National Eating Disorders Association in Brooklyn, NY. Eyanson will be turning his strikeouts into donations for the organization.

data.title: Adaptive IT Workforce Takes Center Stage at Info-Tech LIVE 2026 in Las Vegas as AI Value Hinges on Workforce Readiness
data.description: As AI projects grow in the corporate world, businesses are feeling the heat to turn their investments into tangible results. However, there is a growing concern that workforce preparedness is not keeping up with the rapid advancements in technology. This issue will be a focal point at Info-Tech LIVE 2026 in Las Vegas on June 9.

data.title: NVIDIA, Google and Oracle Take Center Stage at Data Center World 2026 as AI Drives Unprecedented Infrastructure and Power Demands
data.description: In Washington, Data Center World revealed its keynote lineup for the upcoming event. The presentations will include insights from prominent figures in the industry such as Google, NVIDIA, and Oracle. They will tackle key challenges like scaling AI infrastructure, ensuring power security, and reshaping data center strategies amidst the AI era. The program for the 2026 event aims to showcase the remarkable industry evolution underway.
